summary: PR 2273 decompiled several previously stubbed grKraid stage functions, added Kraid ground variable layouts and a grKr_804D6A08 parameter struct, updated prototypes, and added required includes. Bot report records one new .data match and large score improvements for grKraid_801FEA00, grKraid_801FE440, grKraid_801FEE54, grKraid_801FE818, and grKraid_801FE6D8.

key_files.role: Main decompilation body for grKraid stage logic; replaces stubs with implementations for grKraid_801FE440, grKraid_801FE6D8, grKraid_801FE818, grKraid_801FEA00, and grKraid_801FEE54; adjusts grKraid_801FF150 signature; adds camera, grlib, lb, and random includes.
evidence_refs: diff: grkraid.c stubs replaced by implemented functions
bot_report: improvements for grKraid_801FEA00, grKraid_801FE440, grKraid_801FEE54, grKraid_801FE818, grKraid_801FE6D8

key_files.role: Header updates for recovered grKr_804D6A08_t fields and function prototypes, replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS for recovered functions.
evidence_refs: diff: grKr_804D6A08_t void* unk replaced with typed fields
diff: grKraid_801FE6D8 and grKraid_801FEE54 prototypes updated

key_files.role: GroundVars layout recovery for Kraid state fields, including scalar state slots and HSD_JObj pointers.
evidence_refs: diff: grKraid_GroundVars2 padding replaced with typed fields x0-x14

what_changed.text: Implemented grKraid_801FE440 as Kraid map rotation/update logic using Ground vars, rand_inline, Ground_801C3FA4, grAnime calls, HSD_JObjAddRotationZ, Camera_80030E44, and follow-up update calls.

Implemented grKraid_801FE6D8 to capture a hand JObj position, report hand position, compute map rotation speed/acceleration from grKr_804D6A08_t fields, trigger sound/camera events, and mark map rotation direction.
Implemented grKraid_801FE818 initialization logic for Kraid positions, min/max position indices, wait timer, state flags, and cached hand JObjs.

Implemented grKraid_801FEA00 as a multi-state Kraid animation/action controller with switch-based states, animation completion checks, timer gates, sound triggers, visibility flag changes, and hand attack calls.
Implemented grKraid_801FEE54 for random position selection and translate-X updates on Kraid and linked ground object JObjs.
Recovered grKr_804D6A08_t field names for map timing, rotation speed, wait timing, and Kraid X positions.
Expanded grKraid ground variable structs in types.h from padding/partial layout to typed state fields and JObj pointers.
evidence_refs: diff: types.h grKraid_GroundVars and grKraid_GroundVars2 changes

what_changed.text: Updated function prototypes to remove unknown signatures for recovered functions and changed grKraid_801FF150 to accept a Ground_GObj pointer.

smart_moves.text: Recovered shared struct layouts and header prototypes together with function bodies, allowing source to use typed Ground vars and grKr_804D6A08_t fields rather than opaque padding or UNK signatures.

Used existing engine helpers and macros such as GET_GROUND, GET_JOBJ, HSD_JObjSetTranslateX, HSD_JObjClearFlagsAll, HSD_JObjSetFlagsAll, HSD_Randi, grAnime_801C83D0, and Ground_801C53EC in recovered logic.
Kept the high-level Kraid action controller as a switch over a recovered state byte, which is more reviewable than preserving a flat branch ladder.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For stage object decompilation, body recovery may require simultaneous recovery of GroundVars layouts and stage parameter structs; otherwise source is forced into padding or unknown signatures.
evidence_refs: diff: grkraid.c uses gp->gv.kraid and gp->gv.kraid2 fields

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovered function bodies should update owning headers when signatures become known, replacing UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS with concrete parameter and return types.
evidence_refs: diff: grKraid_801FE6D8 changed to void grKraid_801FE6D8(HSD_JObj*,float)
diff: grKraid_801FEE54 changed to void grKraid_801FEE54(Ground_GObj*)

decomp_lessons.lesson: Repeated min/max selection across fixed stage-position arrays is visible in this PR as copied blocks; curator should compare against the natural-loops standard before treating that unrolled form as generally desirable.
evidence_refs: diff: grKraid_801FE818 repeats kraid_pos_x[0] through kraid_pos_x[5] comparisons

naming_conventions.name: grKr_804D6A08_t fields
naming_conventions.convention: Stage parameter struct fields were named semantically for map timing, map rotation speed, Kraid wait timing, and Kraid X positions: map_time_min, map_time_max, map_time_acl, map_rot_spd_min, map_rot_spd_max, kraid_wait_time, kraid_wait_time_add, kraid_pos_x.

naming_conventions.name: Ground var fields remain offset-style
naming_conventions.convention: Recovered GroundVars fields mostly retained x0/x1/x2-style names while types and offsets were clarified, suggesting semantics were not fully proven in this slice.

naming_conventions.name: Local object roles
naming_conventions.convention: Locals use common role names where clear, such as gp for Ground*, jobj for HSD_JObj*, map for another Ground*, and hand/handpos for hand JObj position handling.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Added PAD_STACK in grKraid_801FEA00 and grKraid_801FEE54 to influence stack layout.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Bot report shows score improvements for these functions, but no narrow objdiff explanation for PAD_STACK is included in the slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced static inline rand_inline to express randomized inclusive/exclusive range behavior using HSD_Randi while avoiding divide-by-zero-like zero ranges.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: Evidence supports use in this PR, but there is no review discussion proving it as a global helper pattern.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Used a const zero Vec grKr_803B8278 and copied it into a stack Vec before Camera_80030E44.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.notes: This may be data/rodata matching-related; the bot reports .rodata and .sdata2 improvements, but the slice does not include section ownership explanation.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Recovered switch-based state machine control flow for grKraid_801FEA00 rather than leaving function as a stub.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: Report for GALE01 recorded matched data improvement of 37.56% (+0.03%, +304 bytes), one new .data match for main/melee/gr/grkraid, and seven improvements including major function score gains.
No human review comments or review records were present in the loaded PR slice.

follow_up_queries: grKraid_801FE818 kraid_pos_x unrolled loop natural loop
grKr_803B8278 zero Vec rodata sdata2 ownership
grKr_804D6A08_t map_time_min map_time_max kraid_pos_x data sheet
grKraid_GroundVars2 x0 x1 x2 x3 x4 x5 semantic names

accepted_candidate_records.title: Recover stage GroundVars and parameter structs alongside stage function bodies
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2273 shows grKraid function body recovery landing with matching header and types.h changes: grKr_804D6A08_t was expanded from void* unk to typed parameter fields, grKraid_GroundVars2 padding was replaced with typed state/JObj fields, and recovered functions then used those fields directly.
evidence_refs: diff: grkraid.c recovered functions use gp->gv.kraid and gp->gv.kraid2

accepted_candidate_records.title: Replace unknown prototypes when recovered bodies prove signatures
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR 2273 replaced UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations for grKraid_801FE6D8 and grKraid_801FEE54 with concrete prototypes and updated grKraid_801FF150 to take Ground_GObj* after its call site passed gobj.

source_update_candidates.title: grkraid stage source touches body, header, and shared ground types
source_update_candidates.text: For grKraid decomp work, src/melee/gr/grkraid.c contains stage logic, src/melee/gr/grkraid.h owns grKraid prototypes and grKr_804D6A08_t, and src/melee/gr/types.h owns grKraid_GroundVars and grKraid_GroundVars2 layouts.
evidence_refs: diff: grkraid.h and types.h layout/prototype changes
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful path-scope fact for future grKraid matching tasks; requires curator verification against current source.

source_update_candidates.title: Kraid stage parameter fields recovered in grKr_804D6A08_t
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2273 names grKr_804D6A08_t fields as map_time_min, map_time_max, map_time_acl, map_rot_spd_min, map_rot_spd_max, kraid_wait_time, kraid_wait_time_add, and kraid_pos_x[6].
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential data-sheet update for stage parameter layout; curator should verify against current symbols/data ownership before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: Treat PAD_STACK in high-score PRs as evidence-needing tactic, not style
source_update_candidates.text: PR 2273 uses PAD_STACK in grKraid_801FEA00 and grKraid_801FEE54 while the bot shows high but not perfect score improvements. This supports routing PAD_STACK cases through explicit objdiff/build evidence rather than treating them as normal cleanup.
source_update_candidates.reason: Consistent with existing matching-tactics-need-evidence standard; no new standard should be accepted solely from this PR.

rejection_notes.text: Do not infer that grKraid_801FEA00, grKraid_801FE440, grKraid_801FEE54, grKraid_801FE818, or grKraid_801FE6D8 fully matched; the bot report records high percentages but not 100% for these functions.
evidence_refs: bot_report: function percentages range from 88.93% to 99.85%

rejection_notes.text: Do not promote grKr_803B8278 zero Vec as a general data ownership pattern; the diff adds it and bot reports data/rodata/sdata2 movement, but the slice lacks section ownership reasoning.

Do not treat the repeated kraid_pos_x[0..5] comparison blocks as a preferred style without further objdiff evidence; loaded natural-loops standard says repeated indexed blocks should be checked against natural loops.
